news.title: Oil surges above $100 as Gulf states cut back production; WTI nearly touched $120 a barrel at high
news.summary: Gulf Arab oil producers are cutting production as they run out of storage space. They can't export through the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Congressional Democrats demand reversal of Russian oil sales into India as energy prices soar
news.summary: Russia is reportedly helping Iran target U.S. forces in the Middle East. Russia could now benefit from a windfall of new oil and gas sales.

news.title: Hims & Hers shares surge 50% after Novo Nordisk drops patent infringement case over compounded weight loss drugs
news.summary: Novo dropped its patent-infringement case against telehealth provider Hims & Hers. The companies agreed that Hims would sell Novo's branded medicines.

news.title: Amazon's Zoox expands robotaxi testing to Phoenix and Dallas
news.summary: Zoox will start by deploying a fleet of retrofitted Toyota Highlander SUVs. It will then roll out its toaster-shaped robotaxis for testing.

news.title: Microsoft adds higher-priced Office tier with Copilot as it tries to juice sales with AI
news.summary: Microsoft 365 E7 comes with Copilot, as well as identity, management and security features that might make more businesses adopt AI. The company says Copilot will be available in the U.S. by the end of the year.

news.title: Can my wife switch to my Social Security benefits if she’s born after 1954? I receive a lot more than she does.
news.summary: “We heard something about this no longer being allowed,” says a local resident. “We’ve been told it’s no longer allowed.”

news.title: Hims & Hers’ stock rockets as weight-loss-drug dispute with Novo Nordisk ends
news.summary: Hims & Hers shares jumped more than 50% in premarket trade on Monday. The company ended a dispute with Novo Nordisk by striking a partnership with the drug giant.

news.title: Spiking oil prices basically end any chance of a market ‘melt-up,’ says this Wall Street veteran
news.summary: The prospect of stagflation means stocks may fall into a bear market. Stocks could fall by as much as 10 per cent, according to some analysts.

news.title: This biotech’s stock is soaring after a ‘polarizing’ FDA official is stepping down
news.summary: Vinay Prasad, an official for the Food and Drug Administration, is reportedly stepping down. This is welcome news for biotech companies.

news.title: Oil prices are the No. 1 thing investors are watching right now. Here’s why.
news.summary: Rising oil prices can affect the stock market in significant ways. Oil prices have been on the rise since the start of the year. The price of oil has been rising since the beginning of 2014.
